title: Product

preview.teaser: Closed-circuit wind tunnel with enclosed working section. Speed up to 35 m/s, working section 200×200×500 mm, IP67 protection.

subtitle: FlowTech Aerodynamic Wind Tunnel
pricing: Price upon request — depends on configuration
description: FlowTech is a closed-circuit wind tunnel with an enclosed working section for educational and research purposes. It measures and calculates all key aerodynamic characteristics. Specialized software automates data processing: instantly displays experiment results, builds clear dependency graphs, and generates reports.

items.6: Specialized software with PC data transfer

items.1: Measurement of drag force, lift force, pitching moment, and airflow velocity

courses.title: Educational Programs
courses.description: Each wind tunnel comes with a complete set of educational materials and programs for various levels of education.
